transcript: Dream big, because what if it comes true? Pink is flying high. The singer received the Icon Award at the 2021 Billboard Music Awards, and she brought the house down with her spectacular performance and motivational speech. The megastar started off her big moment with a stripped-down version of her and daughter Willow's song, Color Me in Sunshine. Willow began on stage pretending to be asleep and then joined her rock star mom on the ropes with a high-flying impressive synchronized acrobatic routine showing absolutely no fear the nine-year-old spung and twirled and went upside down as she held her mom's hands. At the end of the performance, Willow jumped up and down and shared an emotional hug with her mom. Pink's energetic performance didn't stop there. The 41-year-old then rocked out to all of her greatest hits from All I Know So Far, Get the Party Started, So What, Blow Me One Last Kiss, and Give Me a Reason. And Pink also had one more special guest for the evening, her four-year-old son, Jameson. The iconic singer's two children joined her on the red carpet, and the cuties were dressed up for the occasion and were there to support their talented mama. After she brought the house down with her performance, she accepted her Billboard Icon Award. But the proud mom also shared the moment by giving her kids a shout-out. Willow nailed it. Jameson nailing it. The singer finished out her big moment by giving an inspirational message. Dream big, because what if it comes true?
